FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Risk‑On Equity Rally Weakens Dollar, Supports Yen
tldr_points: Equity markets hit records, pushing USD lower
Technicals hint at breach of 146.00 resistance
FX.excerpt: Risk‑on equity surge drags USD, creating short bias on USD/JPY amid yield compression.
FX.comment: Risk‑on equity rally weakens USD, technical break below 146.00 supports short bias.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] FLAT: Regulatory Fragmentation Contrasts Institutional Momentum
tldr_points: Regulatory crackdown intensifies globally with Brazil and Tennessee bans
JPMorgan tokenization thesis remains bullish long-term but years away
Technical levels undefined - await price discovery before committing capital
CRYPTO.excerpt: Regulatory headwinds clash with institutional narrative; tactical neutrality warranted
CRYPTO.comment: Await price discovery; regulatory headwinds offset institutional thesis
